challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: Element h2 bi trebalo da sadrži tekst Sharing your card....
Drugi element unutar #share treba da bude p element.
Element p treba da ima tekst Your card was shared on social media!.
tests.testString: assert.strictEqual(document.querySelector("#share").children[1].innerText.trim(), "Your card was shared on social media!");

description:
Vreme je da popunimo drugi section!

Dodajte element h2 u element #share koji sadrži tekst Sharing your card..., a zatim dodajte element p sa tekstom Your card was shared on social media!.
